findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:123-133` proves the object/map equations by `rfl`; Mathlib already provides `ObjectProperty.ι_obj` and `ObjectProperty.ι_map` at `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ObjectProperty/FullSubcategory.lean:61-67`, with `ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory.hasForget₂` at `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ConcreteCategory/Forget.lean:113-116`.
findings.fix: Remove these local lemmas and use `ObjectProperty.ι_obj`/`ObjectProperty.ι_map` through the existing `ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory.hasForget₂` instance.
findings.issue: `forget₂_comoduleCat_obj` and `forget₂_comoduleCat_map` restate the generic full-subcategory forgetful simp lemmas.

findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:217-276` defines `isoToLinearEquiv` via `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv ((incl ...).mapIso i)` and reproves toLinearMap/app/refl/symm/trans lemmas; the original API is at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:333-389`.
findings.fix: Use `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv ((ComoduleCat.isFG ...).ι.mapIso i)` directly, or keep at most a minimal abbreviation without duplicating the full simp API.
findings.issue: `FGComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv` and its simp family are a parallel copy of the existing `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv` API after applying the inclusion functor.

findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:279-340` is `ObjectProperty.isoMk (ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv ... )` plus wrapper lemmas; the underlying TauCeti declarations are `ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv` and its simp/round-trip API at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:393-466`.
findings.fix: Build finite comodule isomorphisms at use sites with `ObjectProperty.isoMk (ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv e h)` and rely on the existing `ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv_*` lemmas.
findings.issue: `FGComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv` and its round-trip/app simp lemmas duplicate `ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv` wrapped in `ObjectProperty.isoMk`.

summary: The PR adds mostly thin full-subcategory wrappers around existing Mathlib/TauCeti APIs. These create parallel names for `ObjectProperty.ι` and `ComoduleCat` iso/linear-equivalence machinery instead of reusing the existing declarations at call sites.
